## Summary

Describe the change without including private specifications or confidential data.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests were added or updated.
- [ ] Schemas were updated when required.
- [ ] Documentation was updated.
- [ ] No private project data is included.
- [ ] No `workspaces/` or `_private` path is tracked.
- [ ] No unapproved source document is included.
- [ ] Examples are explicitly synthetic or sanitized.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` was updated for user-visible changes.
- [ ] `./scripts/check.sh` passes locally.
